notes: Round 3 strict-identity manifest built from real drive assets on 2026-03-12. Use these exact files for generation conditioning and validation. Packaging/logo/geometry may not drift. Roots must preserve real American ginseng morphology from the listed root references.

packaging_references.notes: Primary capsules identity anchor. Preserve Heil logo mark, amber bottle silhouette, cap treatment, earthy label hierarchy, and front-facing label proportions. No blank-label simplification.
Secondary capsules angle. Preserve bottle shoulder curvature, label wrap proportions, visible capsule color cues, and real product-world styling without changing packaging architecture.
Primary roots packaging anchor. Preserve visible Heil packaging identity, label zones, earthy colorway, and retail presentation if packaging remains in frame.

root_references.notes: Root morphology anchor 1. Preserve irregular branching, natural taper, wrinkled skin texture, age cues, and realistic asymmetry.
Root morphology anchor 2. Preserve fibrous texture variation, believable root body thickness, branching realism, and non-synthetic surface detail.
Optional third anchor when a hero root is visible. Preserve single-root silhouette realism, branch junctions, and natural coloration.

packaging_references.notes: Primary tea packaging anchor. Preserve Heil logo mark, tea package geometry, front label architecture, and warm natural product context.
Secondary tea identity anchor. Preserve package proportions, label zones, and recognizable Heil tea presentation under softer lifestyle lighting.
Primary powder packaging anchor. Preserve pouch silhouette, logo mark, label proportions, and real powder SKU presentation.
Secondary powder angle. Preserve pouch geometry, top edge structure, product-world styling, and realistic powder appearance if shown.

root_references.notes: Optional realism anchor when cut root pieces or whole roots appear in the powder scene. Preserve believable fibrous texture and natural coloration.
